overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dense, neon-lit futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player navigates narrow alleys and wide streets beneath massive overpasses, passing by holographic advertisements, traditional paper lanterns, and scattered pedestrians.

events.description: turns right from narrow alley onto wider commercial street

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow alleyway lined with vending machines and neon signs, then turning onto the main street

illuminated sign for brewing company hanging overhead
lit vending machine against the wall

stacked cardboard boxes near the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow neon-lit alley with traditional paper lanterns and vending machines. The player turns right onto a wider street, passing stacked cardboard boxes and concrete walls with utility fixtures.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a medium-width commercial street lined with yellow barriers. The player passes distinctive neon signs including a large red lip sign and blue bottle sign, along with a food stall featuring green stools. Traditional paper lanterns hang overhead as the player moves deeper into the district.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial avenue under elevated highway

moves from open street to area directly beneath massive overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering the main avenue beneath the elevated highway, passing parked cars and oncoming traffic

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Allen
large green holographic cube advertisement floating above street
futuristic black car parked along the curb
blue neon hotel sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the asphalt street beneath the looming elevated highway overpass. A green holographic cube advertisement floats on the right while futuristic vehicles pass by. The environment opens up into a wide avenue with large digital billboards and a green street sign marking 'Allen' street.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor under overpass with holographic ads

events.description: steam or smoke visible rising from vents near the street surface

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the massive overpass surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and construction barriers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal shirt and cap walking ahead on the sidewalk

steam rising from ground vents creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense commercial corridor directly beneath the massive concrete overpass. The area is filled with steam rising from street vents and surrounded by orange construction scaffolding. Holographic advertisements line both sides of the street as the player approaches a distant traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection beneath overpass with traffic signals

events.description: approaches red traffic light at intersection with crossing pedestrians
turns left at the intersection corner following the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching a traffic intersection, waiting at the red light before turning left, surrounded by other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car stopped at the red traffic light

entered.detail: curved multi-story building at the street corner with illuminated windows
marked pedestrian crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player reaches a busy intersection beneath the overpass, approaching a red traffic light where vehicles and pedestrians wait. Steam continues to rise from street vents on the right. The player turns left at the corner, passing a curved multi-story building with illuminated signage while futuristic cars wait at the signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a sprawling, high-tech urban avenue. It begins amidst traditional paper lanterns and vending machines in a narrow passage, moving past stacked cardboard boxes and concrete utility walls as the camera turns right. As the path opens into a commercial street, the view shifts to follow a line of yellow barriers past vibrant red lip and blue bottle neon signs and a food stall with green stools. The scene then expands further as the camera crosses an asphalt road beneath the heavy shadow of an elevated highway overpass, passing a floating green holographic cube and futuristic traffic. Finally, the environment opens completely into a wide avenue dominated by massive digital billboards and a green street sign marking Allen street.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense commercial corridor that transitions from a confined industrial underpass into a busy urban intersection. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving through rising steam and orange construction scaffolding while holographic advertisements flicker along the street. As the camera approaches a distant traffic light, the narrow corridor opens up into a wide crossing where vehicles and pedestrians gather. The scene then shifts as the player turns left at the corner, passing a curved multi-story building with illuminated signage while futuristic cars wait at the signal.
